locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

locations.name: 湿地
locations.summary: 濕地（wetland）是永久或季節性被较浅的水（少于6米的淡水、半咸水或海水）掩蓋的獨特自然环境，是一種許多缺氧過程具有優勢的半水生生態系統，也是陸地生態系統和水域生態系統之間的過渡性地帶。有許多水生植物生長在土壤长期被水体浸泡的特定濕地…

locations.name: 鹽鹼灘
locations.summary: 鹽鹼灘，又稱鹽沼，是沿海潮間帶和陸地間的一種生態系統，海水或鹹水有規律地湧入流出地帶。這一地帶主要生長鹽土植物。這些植物是陸生植物且耐鹽鹼。在水域食物鏈及海陸營養交換中鹽鹼灘扮演著重要的地位，此外次地帶也為一些陸地生物的生存提供了支持。同…

relations.subject: Black-backed bittern
relations.evidence: * Ixobrychus minutus dubius Mathews, 1912 * Ixobrychus minutus alisteri Mathews, 1913 * Ixobrychus minutus queenslandicus Mathews, 1914 * Ixobrychus minutus victoria Mathews, 1915 * Ixobrychus novaezelandiae dubius | range_map = Ixobrychus dubius map.svg }} The black-backed bittern (Botaurus dubius), also known as the black-backed least bittern or Australian little bittern, is a little-known species of heron in the family Ardeidae found in Australia and vagrant to southern New Guinea

relations.subject: Black-backed bittern
relations.evidence: * Ixobrychus minutus dubius Mathews, 1912 * Ixobrychus minutus alisteri Mathews, 1913 * Ixobrychus minutus queenslandicus Mathews, 1914 * Ixobrychus minutus victoria Mathews, 1915 * Ixobrychus novaezelandiae dubius | range_map = Ixobrychus dubius map.svg }} The black-backed bittern (Botaurus dubius), also known as the black-backed least bittern or Australian little bittern, is a little-known species of heron in the family Ardeidae found in Australia and vagrant to southern New Guinea

relations.subject: Black-backed bittern
relations.evidence: The birds are mainly found in freshwater wetlands, where they inhabit dense emergent vegetation of reeds and sedges, and inundated shrub thickets

relations.subject: Black-backed bittern
relations.evidence: They are also occasionally found in brackish and saline wetlands such as mangrove swamps, Juncus-dominated salt marsh and the wooded margins of coastal lagoons

relations.subject: Black-backed bittern
relations.evidence: Threats include various ongoing wetland degradation factors such as salinisation, drainage and the diversion of water for irrigation, as well as the destruction of nesting habitat by inappropriate burning regimens
relations.object_summary: 湿地水文和植被结构被改变导致适宜生境下降。
